---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for SteadyPlan
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or gap. E.g. "I'd like to track dividends separately from capital growth."

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like it to work.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
